title: OpenAIRE Next Steps: OpenAIRE AKME LE
author: Kuchma, Iryna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The three-year OpenAIRE Advance project will be completed in February 2021. However, this certainly does not end the activities of its researchers in the field of Open Science in Europe. The idea will be continued with newly created OpenAIRE AMKE – legal entity, non-profit civil partnership, of various institutions all over Europe. In this talk, we will show you the future of OpenAIRE.
steps_raw: The three-year OpenAIRE Advance project will be completed in February 2021. However, this certainly does not end the activities of its researchers in the field of Open Science in Europe. The idea will be continued with newly created OpenAIRE AMKE – legal entity, non-profit civil partnership, of various institutions all over Europe. In this talk, we will show you the future of OpenAIRE.
